role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin) and brand name 'Sadolin' as a linguistic marker.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed soil color (red laterite), vegetation density, and terrain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific flora (Mango, banana/Musa) and canopy types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed infrastructure standards (wooden poles, road width, shop architecture).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (car hood, general 'look') to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Uganda. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (red soil, Sadolin brand, banana leaves) that was effectively utilized by the tournament judge to distinguish Uganda from its closest regional competitors (Kenya, Tanzania).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described red soil and lush greenery.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified banana leaves and broadleaf canopy.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described wooden poles and unpaved shoulders.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly noted the white car hood.
